common.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue.

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset it.

reset.title: Reset your password
reset.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
reset.invalidLinkText: This link is missing information. Please request a new one.
reset.success: Your password has been updated. Please sign in.
reset.expired: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

invite.title: Accept your invitation
invite.subtitle: Set a password to activate your account.
invite.invalidLinkText: This link is missing information. Please ask an administrator for a new invitation.
invite.success: Your account is ready. Please sign in.
invite.expired: This invitation is invalid or has expired.

users.subtitle: Manage the people who have access to this workspace.
users.inviteHint: The user will receive an email with a link to set their password.
users.cannotDeleteSelf: You can't delete your own account.
users.protectedTooltip: This account is protected and can't be modified.

roles.subtitle: Define what each group of users is allowed to do.

delete.title: Delete role
delete.text: Delete the {name} role? This cannot be undone.

settings.subtitle: Configure how this workspace behaves.
settings.readonlyHint: You have read-only access to settings.

user_creation_mode.label: New-user creation
user_creation_mode.description: How new users get access when an admin creates them.

registration_enabled.label: Public registration
registration_enabled.description: Allow people to create their own account via the sign-up endpoint.

user_creation_mode.choice: Let the admin choose per user

permissions.subtitle: The permissions your code enforces, and the roles that grant them.
permissions.readonlyHint: Permissions are defined in code and can't be edited here — assign them to roles on the Roles page.
